title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Joe
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion Joe             Quote Post by Otakumike » Tue Sep 01, 2009 4:06 pm the eva game for PSP i need help doing a fan traslation of the game been doing Funsubs for 8 years but to avoid getting flamed by other people like us for missing words or miss dection of a word or a word is used in the worng context i need help from over EVA fans

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 01, 2009 5:03 pm I don't mean to be a dick, particularly as I'm not at all fluent in Japanese myself, but please tell me your translations are better-written than this post. :X

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Tue Sep 01, 2009 6:38 pm I thought this thread was going to be about those coffee cans

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Sep 01, 2009 7:19 pm From the people who brought you "Whatever Happened to Neon Genesis Evangelion Jones?"

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Sep 03, 2009 10:33 am Uhh the game was only released this year, I'm not sure where "8 years" comes into.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Thu Sep 03, 2009 10:39 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Uhh the game was only released this year, I'm not sure where "8 years" comes into.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Sep 08, 2009 12:20 am SSD owns the game now; she'd be happy to help! Right, SSD?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 16, 2009 6:55 pm Nice try. I'm way too busy to help with any translationstuffs unless it's something I've already been planning on working on for some time.
